constraints: POST /facilities and PATCH /facilities/{id} are admin-only; any other role_key MUST return 403 before the handler executes.
PUT /facilities/{facility_id}/capabilities is restricted to admin and placement_coordinator; intake_staff, clinical_reviewer, and read_only MUST receive 403.
POST /facilities/{facility_id}/insurance-rules is admin-only; all other roles MUST receive 403.
PATCH /insurance-rules/{rule_id} is restricted to admin and placement_coordinator; all other roles MUST receive 403.
FacilityCapabilities field names MUST exactly match the corresponding ClinicalAssessment boolean field names; renaming either model requires a coordinated change to both.
last_verified_at MUST be set to the current UTC timestamp on every PUT capabilities and every POST or PATCH insurance-rule operation.
Supabase RLS policies MUST be defined on facilities, facility_capabilities, facility_insurance_rules, facility_contacts, and facility_preferences tables enforcing organization_id isolation.
Database connection MUST use NullPool and statement_cache_size=0 for Supabase compatibility.

FacilityContact Phase 2 voice fields (phone_extension, best_call_window, phone_contact_name) MUST be stored in the schema now even though they are not surfaced in Phase 1 UI, to avoid a future migration.
All facility writes MUST produce an AuditEvent record.
